products.name: MacBook Pro 14"
products.description: Apple M3 Pro chip with 12-core CPU, 18-core GPU, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD. Perfect for developers, designers, and creators who need serious power.

products.name: iPhone 15 Pro
products.description: A17 Pro chip, 48MP main camera with 24MP photos, Titanium design with USB-C. The ultimate smartphone for pros.

products.name: iPad Pro 12.9"
products.description: M2 chip, Liquid Retina XDR display, Apple Pencil hover support. Perfect for artists, students, and professionals.

products.name: AirPods Pro 2
products.description: Active Noise Cancellation, Adaptive Audio, Personalized Spatial Audio, and up to 6 hours of battery life.

products.name: Apple Watch Series 9
products.description: S9 chip, Double tap gesture, Brighter display, advanced health features including ECG and blood oxygen monitoring.
